§ 002 — 05  /  Editorial

canvas

The Makeup Magazine

_Monthly · November 2025

Year2025
TypeEditorial
CategoryCollege
Scroll

Brief

Design a
magazine.

Canvas is a monthly magazine dedicated to makeup professionals: artists, fashion makeup artists, beauty creators, stylists, educators, and advanced students. Design a complete editorial system — from brand identity and visual language to full page layout, typography hierarchy, and digital adaptation.

Process

Beauty
out of
bounds.

A publication that refuses to whisper. Canvas balances editorial inspiration, solid technical content, and cultural coverage — all under a bold visual system of neon green, hot pink, red, and gold. Every section has its own colour code, but the attitude is always the same: loud, expert, unapologetic.

Feature · p.24
Beauty Out
of Bounds
p. 24–25
Department · p.41
Skin Deep
p. 41
Artist's Bench · p.08
Artist's
Bench
p. 08–09

Digital Edition

Built for
the screen.

Canvas extends beyond print with a full digital experience — the same bold editorial voice, optimised for mobile. The neon nav bar, tight typographic hierarchy, and section colour-coding all translate seamlessly into a scroll-first interface for working artists on the go.
